nodes.name: 黄腹隐蜂鸟
nodes.summary: 黄腹隐蜂鸟（Buff-bellied hermit，学名 Phaethornis subochraceus），分类上属于雨燕目，并归入蜂鸟科，在图谱中标记为无危（LC）物种，已关联7个分布地点节点，常见栖息地包括灌丛。
nodes.shortSummary: 黄腹隐蜂鸟（学名：Phaethornis subochraceus），是雨燕目蜂鸟科的一种鸟类。 黄腹隐蜂鸟体重约3.8克，翼长约50.6毫米，嘴峰长约30.5毫米，喙宽度约2.4毫米，喙厚度约2.4毫米，跗蹠长约4毫米，尾长约58.4毫米。黄腹隐蜂鸟在其分布区内为留鸟，其栖息…

nodes.name: 贝尼省

nodes.name: 雨燕目

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: It is found in Bolivia and Brazil.{{cite web |url=https://www.worldbirdnames.org/ |title=IOC World Bird List (v 11.2) |last1=Gill |first1= F

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: The buff-bellied hermit is found in the eastern Andean foothills of Bolivia from southern Beni to eastern Santa Cruz departments and into the Brazilian states of Mato Grosso and Mato Grosso do Sul. It has also been recorded as a vagrant in Paraguay. It inhabits the understory of several landscapes including deciduous and semi-deciduous forest, secondary forest, open woodland, and shrubland
